entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《嫦娥》
entries.content: 嫦娥應悔偷靈藥，碧海青天夜夜心。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《瑤瑟怨》
entries.content: 冰簟銀牀夢不成，碧天如水夜雲輕。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其三》
entries.content: 畫圖省識春風面，環佩空歸夜月魂。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 下終南山過斛斯山人宿置酒
entries.title: 李白《下終南山過斛斯山人宿置酒》
entries.content: 暮從碧山下，山月隨人歸。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《長恨歌》
entries.content: 峨嵋山下少人行，旌旗無光日色薄。蜀江水碧蜀山青，聖主朝朝暮暮情。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《琵琶行》
entries.content: 春江花朝秋月夜，往往取酒還獨傾。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《關山月》
entries.content: 明月出天山，蒼茫雲海間。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《夜雨寄北》
entries.content: 君問歸期未有期，巴山夜雨漲秋池。

entries.author: 韋莊
entries.title: 韋莊《金陵圖》
entries.content: 誰謂傷心畫不成，畫人心逐世人情。

entries.author: 張泌
entries.title: 張泌《寄人》
entries.content: 多情只有春庭月，猶爲離人照落花。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《渡荊門送別》
entries.content: 月下飛天鏡，雲生結海樓。

entries.author: 馬戴
entries.title: 馬戴《楚江懷古三首·其一》
entries.content: 廣澤生明月，蒼山夾亂流。雲中君不見，竟夕自悲秋。

entries.author: 常建
entries.title: 常建《題破山寺後禪院》
entries.content: 山光悅鳥性，潭影空人心。

entries.author: 張喬
entries.title: 張喬《書邊事》
entries.content: 調角斷清秋，徵人倚戍樓。春風對青冢，白日落梁州。

entries.author: 戴叔倫
entries.title: 戴叔倫《江鄉故人偶集客舍》
entries.content: 天秋月又滿，城闕夜千重。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·相見時難別亦難》
entries.content: 曉鏡但愁雲鬢改，夜吟應覺月光寒。

entries.author: 祖詠
entries.title: 祖詠《望薊門》
entries.content: 沙場烽火侵胡月，海畔雲山擁薊城。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《蘇武廟》
entries.content: 雲邊雁斷胡天月，隴上羊歸塞草煙。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《晚次鄂州》
entries.content: 三湘愁鬢逢秋色，萬里歸心對月明。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《佳人》
entries.content: 在山泉水清，出山泉水濁。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《夕次盱眙縣》
entries.content: 人歸山郭暗，雁下蘆洲白。獨夜憶秦關，聽鍾未眠客。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.work: 走馬川行奉送封大夫出師
entries.title: 岑參《走馬川行奉送封大夫出師》
entries.content: 輪臺九月風夜吼，一川碎石大如鬥，隨風滿地石亂走。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.title: 岑參《白雪歌送武判官歸京》
entries.content: 忽如一夜春風來，千樹萬樹梨花開。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.title: 韓愈《山石》
entries.content: 夜深靜臥百蟲絕，清月出嶺光入扉。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.title: 韓愈《八月十五夜贈張功曹》
entries.content: 纖雲四卷天無河，清風吹空月舒波。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《塞下曲·飲馬渡秋水》
entries.content: 飲馬渡秋水，水寒風似刀。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《桃源行》
entries.content: 漁舟逐水愛山春，兩岸桃花夾古津。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 清平調·雲想衣裳花想容
entries.title: 李白《清平調·雲想衣裳花想容》
entries.content: 雲想衣裳花想容，春風拂檻露華濃。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《麗人行》
entries.content: 三月三日天氣新，長安水邊多麗人。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《鹿柴》
entries.content: 空山不見人，但聞人語響。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《山中送別》
entries.content: 春草明年綠，王孫歸不歸？

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《宿建德江》
entries.content: 野曠天低樹，江清月近人。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《春曉》
entries.content: 夜來風雨聲，花落知多少。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《秋夜寄邱員外》
entries.content: 懷君屬秋夜，散步詠涼天。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《春宮曲》
entries.content: 昨夜風開露井桃，未央前殿月輪高。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 黃鶴樓送孟浩然之廣陵
entries.title: 李白《黃鶴樓送孟浩然之廣陵》
entries.content: 故人西辭黃鶴樓，煙花三月下揚州。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《贈別·其二》
entries.content: 蠟燭有心還惜別，替人垂淚到天明。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《金谷園》
entries.content: 日暮東風怨啼鳥，落花猶似墜樓人。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《寄揚州韓綽判官》
entries.content: 二十四橋明月夜，玉人何處教吹簫？

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《秋夕》
entries.content: 天階夜色涼如水，臥看牽牛織女星。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《泊秦淮》
entries.content: 煙籠寒水月籠沙，夜泊秦淮近酒家。

entries.author: 柳中庸
entries.title: 柳中庸《徵人怨》
entries.content: 三春白雪歸青冢，萬里黃河繞黑山。

entries.author: 陳陶
entries.title: 陳陶《隴西行》
entries.content: 可憐無定河邊骨，猶是春閨夢裏人！

entries.author: 韓翃
entries.title: 韓翃《寒食》
entries.content: 春城無處不飛花，寒食東風御柳斜。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《終南山》
entries.content: 太乙近天都，連山接海隅。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《酬張少府》
entries.content: 松風吹解帶，山月照彈琴。君問窮通理，漁歌入浦深。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《輞川閒居贈裴秀才迪》
entries.content: 寒山轉蒼翠，秋水日潺湲。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《山居秋暝》
entries.content: 空山新雨後，天氣晚來秋。

entries.author: 王灣
entries.title: 王灣《次北固山下》
entries.content: 海日生殘夜，江春入舊年。

entries.author: 司空曙
entries.title: 司空曙《雲陽館與韓紳宿別》
entries.content: 故人江海別，幾度隔山川。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《聽蜀僧浚彈琴》
entries.content: 不覺碧山暮，秋雲暗幾重。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《夜泊牛渚懷古》
entries.content: 牛渚西江夜，青天無片雲。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《涼思》
entries.content: 北斗兼春遠，南陵寓使遲。天涯占夢數，疑誤有新知。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《落花》
entries.content: 腸斷未忍掃，眼穿仍欲歸。芳心向春盡，所得是沾衣。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《奉濟驛重送嚴公四韻》
entries.content: 遠送從此別，青山空復情。幾時杯重把，昨夜月同行。

entries.author: 杜審言
entries.title: 杜審言《和晉陵陸丞早春遊望》
entries.content: 雲霞出海曙，梅柳渡江春。

entries.author: 沈佺期
entries.title: 沈佺期《雜詩三首·其三》
entries.content: 少婦今春意，良人昨夜情。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《歲暮歸南山》
entries.content: 北闕休上書，南山歸敝廬。不才明主棄，多病故人疏。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《與諸子登峴山》
entries.content: 水落魚梁淺，天寒夢澤深。

entries.author: 韋莊
entries.title: 韋莊《章臺夜思》
entries.content: 清瑟怨遙夜，繞弦風雨哀。孤燈聞楚角，殘月下章臺。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《淮上喜會梁州故人》
entries.content: 何因不歸去？淮上有秋山。

entries.author: 崔塗
entries.title: 崔塗《除夜有懷》
entries.content: 亂山殘雪夜，孤燭異鄉人。

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《望月懷遠》
entries.content: 海上生明月，天涯共此時。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《尋南溪常道士》
entries.content: 白雲依靜渚，春草閉閒門。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《新年作》
entries.content: 老至居人下，春歸在客先。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.work: 秋日登吳公臺上寺遠眺
entries.title: 劉長卿《秋日登吳公臺上寺遠眺》
entries.content: 野寺來人少，雲峯隔水深。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《送李端》
entries.content: 路出寒雲外，人歸暮雪時。

entries.author: 王維
entries.work: 奉和聖制從蓬萊向興慶閣道
entries.title: 王維《奉和聖制從蓬萊向興慶閣道》
entries.content: 雲裏帝城雙鳳闕，雨中春樹萬人家。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《望月有感》
entries.content: 共看明月應垂淚，一夜鄉心五處同。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《登金陵鳳凰臺》
entries.content: 三山半落青天外，二水中分白鷺洲。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·颯颯東風細雨來》
entries.content: 春心莫共花爭發，一寸相思一寸灰！

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·昨夜星辰昨夜風》
entries.content: 昨夜星辰昨夜風，畫樓西畔桂堂東。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《錦瑟》
entries.content: 莊生曉夢迷蝴蝶，望帝春心託杜鵑。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其一》
entries.content: 三峽樓臺淹日月，五溪衣服共雲山。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其二》
entries.content: 江山故宅空文藻，雲雨荒臺豈夢思。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《宿府》
entries.content: 永夜角聲悲自語，中天月色好誰看。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《登樓》
entries.content: 錦江春色來天地，玉壘浮雲變古今。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《野望》
entries.content: 海內風塵諸弟隔，天涯涕淚一身遙。

entries.author: 皇甫冉
entries.title: 皇甫冉《春思》
entries.content: 家住層城臨漢苑，心隨明月到胡天。

entries.author: 崔曙
entries.work: 九日登望仙台呈劉明府
entries.title: 崔曙《九日登望仙台呈劉明府》
entries.content: 三晉雲山皆北向，二陵風雨自東來。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.work: 自夏口至鸚鵡洲夕望岳陽
entries.title: 劉長卿《自夏口至鸚鵡洲夕望岳陽》
entries.content: 漢口夕陽斜渡鳥，洞庭秋水遠連天。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《夏日南亭懷辛大》
entries.content: 山光忽西落，池月漸東上。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.work: 宿業師山房待丁大不至
entries.title: 孟浩然《宿業師山房待丁大不至》
entries.content: 鬆月生夜涼，風泉滿清聽。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《廬山謠寄盧侍御虛舟》
entries.content: 廬山秀出南鬥傍，屏風九疊雲錦張。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《夢遊天姥吟留別》
entries.content: 天姥連天向天橫，勢拔五嶽掩赤城。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《古意》
entries.content: 黃雲隴底白雲飛，未得報恩不能歸。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《送陳章甫》
entries.content: 四月南風大麥黃，棗花未落桐陰長。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《古柏行》
entries.content: 雲來氣接巫峽長，月出寒通雪山白。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《寄韓諫議》
entries.content: 美人娟娟隔秋水，濯足洞庭望八荒。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.title: 柳宗元《漁翁》
entries.content: 回看天際下中流，巖上無心雲相逐。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.work: 謁衡岳廟遂宿嶽寺題門樓
entries.title: 韓愈《謁衡岳廟遂宿嶽寺題門樓》
entries.content: 夜投佛寺上高閣，星月掩映雲曈曨。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《秋夜曲》
entries.content: 銀箏夜久殷勤弄，心怯空房不忍歸。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 行路難·金樽清酒鬥十千
entries.title: 李白《行路難·金樽清酒鬥十千》
entries.content: 長風破浪會有時，直掛雲帆濟滄海。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 行路難·有耳莫洗潁川水
entries.title: 李白《行路難·有耳莫洗潁川水》
entries.content: 含光混世貴無名，何用孤高比雲月？

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《將進酒》
entries.content: 君不見，黃河之水天上來，奔流到海不復回。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《玉階怨》
entries.content: 卻下水晶簾，玲瓏望秋月。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《長相思·其一》
entries.content: 天長路遠魂飛苦，夢魂不到關山難。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《長相思·其二》
entries.content: 此曲有意無人傳，願隨春風寄燕然。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《蜀道難》
entries.content: 又聞子規啼夜月，愁空山。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《兵車行》
entries.content: 道旁過者問行人，行人但云點行頻。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《哀江頭》
entries.content: 人生有情淚沾臆，江水江花豈終極！

entries.author: 王之渙
entries.title: 王之渙《登鸛雀樓》
entries.content: 白日依山盡，黃河入海流。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《竹裏館》
entries.content: 深林人不知，明月來相照。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.title: 柳宗元《江雪》
entries.content: 千山鳥飛絕，萬徑人蹤滅。

entries.author: 賈島
entries.title: 賈島《尋隱者不遇》
entries.content: 只在此山中，雲深不知處。

entries.author: 裴迪
entries.title: 裴迪《送崔九》
entries.content: 歸山深淺去，須盡丘壑美。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《送靈澈上人》
entries.content: 荷笠帶斜陽，青山獨歸遠。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《聽彈琴》
entries.content: 泠泠七絃上，靜聽松風寒。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《送上人》
entries.content: 孤雲將野鶴，豈向人間住。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《芙蓉樓送辛漸》
entries.content: 寒雨連江夜入吳，平明送客楚山孤。

entries.author: 王翰
entries.title: 王翰《涼州詞》
entries.content: 葡萄美酒夜光杯，欲飲琵琶馬上催。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《後宮詞》
entries.content: 淚溼羅巾夢不成，夜深前殿按歌聲。

entries.author: 朱慶餘
entries.title: 朱慶餘《宮中詞》
entries.content: 寂寂花時閉院門，美人相並立瓊軒。

entries.author: 李益
entries.title: 李益《夜上受降城聞笛》
entries.content: 不知何處吹蘆管，一夜徵人盡望鄉。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《隋宮》
entries.content: 春風舉國裁宮錦，半作障泥半作帆。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《爲有》
entries.content: 爲有云屏無限嬌，鳳城寒盡怕春宵。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《江南逢李龜年》
entries.content: 正是江南好風景，落花時節又逢君。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《贈別·其一》
entries.content: 春風十裏揚州路，卷上珠簾總不如。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.work: 將赴吳興登樂遊原一絕
entries.title: 杜牧《將赴吳興登樂遊原一絕》
entries.content: 清時有味是無能，閒愛孤雲靜愛僧。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《赤壁》
entries.content: 東風不與周郎便，銅雀春深鎖二喬。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《滁州西澗》
entries.content: 春潮帶雨晚來急，野渡無人舟自橫。

entries.author: 張旭
entries.title: 張旭《桃花溪》
entries.content: 桃花盡日隨流水，洞在清溪何處邊。

entries.author: 張祜
entries.title: 張祜《題金陵渡》
entries.content: 潮落夜江斜月裏，兩三星火是瓜州。

entries.author: 張祜
entries.title: 張祜《集靈臺·其一》
entries.content: 日光斜照集靈臺，紅樹花迎曉露開。

entries.author: 張繼
entries.title: 張繼《楓橋夜泊》
entries.content: 姑蘇城外寒山寺，夜半鐘聲到客船。

entries.author: 劉方平
entries.title: 劉方平《月夜》
entries.content: 今夜偏知春氣暖，蟲聲新透綠窗紗。

entries.author: 劉方平
entries.title: 劉方平《春怨》
entries.content: 寂寞空庭春欲晚，梨花滿地不開門。

entries.author: 劉禹錫
entries.title: 劉禹錫《春詞》
entries.content: 新妝宜面下朱樓，深鎖春光一院愁。

entries.author: 鄭畋
entries.title: 鄭畋《馬嵬坡》
entries.content: 玄宗回馬楊妃死，雲雨雖亡日月新。

entries.author: 王勃
entries.title: 王勃《送杜少府之任蜀州》
entries.content: 海內存知己，天涯若比鄰。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《送梓州李使君》
entries.content: 山中一夜雨，樹杪百重泉。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《漢江臨眺》
entries.content: 江流天地外，山色有無中。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《終南別業》
entries.content: 行到水窮處，坐看雲起時。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《過香積寺》
entries.content: 古木無人徑，深山何處鐘。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《歸嵩山作》
entries.content: 荒城臨古渡，落日滿秋山。

entries.author: 司空曙
entries.title: 司空曙《喜外弟盧綸見宿》
entries.content: 靜夜四無鄰，荒居舊業貧。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《賦得古原草送別》
entries.content: 野火燒不盡，春風吹又生。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.title: 岑參《寄左省杜拾遺》
entries.content: 曉隨天仗入，暮惹御香歸。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《贈孟浩然》
entries.content: 吾愛孟夫子，風流天下聞。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《送友人》
entries.content: 浮雲遊子意，落日故人情。

entries.author: 李益
entries.title: 李益《喜見外弟又言別》
entries.content: 別來滄海事，語罷暮天鍾。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《北青蘿》
entries.content: 殘陽西入崦，茅屋訪孤僧。落葉人何在，寒雲路幾層。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《旅夜書懷》
entries.content: 細草微風岸，危檣獨夜舟。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《月夜憶舍弟》
entries.content: 戍鼓斷人行，邊秋一雁聲。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《天末懷李白》
entries.content: 涼風起天末，君子意如何。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《月夜》
entries.content: 今夜鄜州月，閨中只獨看。遙憐小兒女，未解憶長安。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《春望》
entries.content: 國破山河在，城春草木深。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《旅宿》
entries.content: 遠夢歸侵曉，家書到隔年。

entries.author: 杜荀鶴
entries.title: 杜荀鶴《春宮怨》
entries.content: 風暖鳥聲碎，日高花影重。年年越溪女，相憶採芙蓉。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《宿桐廬江寄廣陵舊遊》
entries.content: 山暝聞猿愁，滄江急夜流。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《留別王維》
entries.content: 寂寂竟何待，朝朝空自歸。欲尋芳草去，惜與故人違。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《早寒有懷》
entries.content: 我家襄水曲，遙隔楚雲端。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《望洞庭湖贈張丞相》
entries.content: 八月湖水平，涵虛混太清。

entries.author: 馬戴
entries.title: 馬戴《灞上秋居》
entries.content: 落葉他鄉樹，寒燈獨夜人。

entries.author: 崔塗
entries.title: 崔塗《孤雁》
entries.content: 渚雲低暗度，關月冷相隨。

entries.author: 張籍
entries.title: 張籍《沒蕃故人》
entries.content: 無人收廢帳，歸馬識殘旗。

entries.author: 許渾
entries.title: 許渾《秋日赴闕題潼關驛樓》
entries.content: 樹色隨山迥，河聲入海遙。

entries.author: 許渾
entries.title: 許渾《早秋》
entries.content: 遙夜泛清瑟，西風生翠蘿。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《送人東遊》
entries.content: 江上幾人在，天涯孤棹還。

entries.author: 皎然
entries.title: 皎然《尋陸鴻漸不遇》
entries.content: 扣門無犬吠，欲去問西家。報道山中去，歸時每日斜。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《餞別王十一南遊》
entries.content: 飛鳥沒何處，青山空向人。

entries.author: 劉禹錫
entries.title: 劉禹錫《蜀先主廟》
entries.content: 天地英雄氣，千秋尚凜然。勢分三足鼎，業復五銖錢。

entries.author: 劉昚虛
entries.title: 劉昚虛《闕題》
entries.content: 時有落花至，遠隨流水香。

entries.author: 錢起
entries.title: 錢起《送僧歸日本》
entries.content: 水月通禪寂，魚龍聽梵聲。

entries.author: 錢起
entries.title: 錢起《谷口書齋寄楊補闕》
entries.content: 閒鷺棲常早，秋花落更遲。

entries.author: 駱賓王
entries.title: 駱賓王《在獄詠蟬》
entries.content: 無人信高潔，誰爲表予心？

entries.author: 韓翃
entries.title: 韓翃《酬程延秋夜即事見贈》
entries.content: 星河秋一雁，砧杵夜千家。

entries.author: 元稹
entries.title: 元稹《遣悲懷三首·其二》
entries.content: 誠知此恨人人有，貧賤夫妻百事哀。

entries.author: 王維
entries.work: 和賈至舍人早朝大明宮
entries.title: 王維《和賈至舍人早朝大明宮》
entries.content: 絳幘雞人送曉籌，尚衣方進翠雲裘。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《積雨輞川莊作》
entries.content: 山中習靜觀朝槿，松下清齋折露葵。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.work: 奉和中書舍人賈至早朝
entries.title: 岑參《奉和中書舍人賈至早朝》
entries.content: 雞鳴紫陌曙光寒，鶯囀皇州春色闌。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·重幃深下莫愁堂》
entries.content: 風波不信菱枝弱，月露誰教桂葉香。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·來是空言去絕蹤》
entries.content: 劉郎已恨蓬山遠，更隔蓬山一萬重！

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《春雨》
entries.content: 遠路應悲春晼晚，殘霄猶得夢依稀。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《籌筆驛》
entries.content: 猿鳥猶疑畏簡書，風雲常爲護儲胥。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《隋宮》
entries.content: 玉璽不緣歸日角，錦帆應是到天涯。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《送魏萬之京》
entries.content: 鴻雁不堪愁裏聽，雲山況是客中過。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《登高》
entries.content: 風急天高猿嘯哀，渚清沙白鳥飛回。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《蜀相》
entries.content: 三顧頻煩天下計，兩朝開濟老臣心。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《客至》
entries.content: 舍南舍北皆春水，但見羣鷗日日來。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.work: 登柳州城樓寄漳汀封連四州
entries.title: 柳宗元《登柳州城樓寄漳汀封連四州》
entries.content: 城上高樓接大荒，海天愁思正茫茫。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《寄李儋元錫》
entries.content: 去年花裏逢君別，今日花開又一年。

entries.author: 崔顥
entries.title: 崔顥《行經華陰》
entries.content: 武帝祠前雲欲散，仙人掌上雨初晴。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《利州南渡》
entries.content: 波上馬嘶看棹去，柳邊人歇待船歸。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《江州重別薛六柳》
entries.content: 今日龍鍾人共棄，愧君猶遣慎風波。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《長沙過賈誼宅》
entries.content: 寂寂江山搖落處，憐君何事到天涯。

entries.author: 劉禹錫
entries.title: 劉禹錫《西塞山懷古》
entries.content: 人世幾回傷往事，山形依舊枕寒流。

entries.author: 錢起
entries.title: 錢起《贈闕下裴舍人》
entries.content: 二月黃鶯飛上林，春城紫禁曉陰陰。

entries.author: 韓翃
entries.title: 韓翃《同題仙遊觀》
entries.content: 山色遙連秦樹晚，砧聲近報漢宮秋。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.work: 同從弟銷南齋玩月憶山陰
entries.title: 王昌齡《同從弟銷南齋玩月憶山陰》
entries.content: 美人清江畔，是夜越吟苦。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《送別》
entries.content: 君言不得意，歸臥南山陲。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《青溪》
entries.content: 言入黃花川，每逐清溪水。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《月下獨酌四首·其一》
entries.content: 暫伴月將影，行樂須及春。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《春思》
entries.content: 春風不相識，何事入羅幃。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《夢李白·其一》
entries.content: 故人入我夢，明我長相憶。恐非平生魂，路遠不可測。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《夢李白·其二》
entries.content: 三夜頻夢君，情親見君意。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《望嶽》
entries.content: 蕩胸生曾雲，決眥入歸鳥。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《秋登蘭山寄張五》
entries.content: 北山白雲裏，隱者自怡悅。

entries.author: 丘爲
entries.title: 丘爲《尋西山隱者不遇》
entries.content: 若非巾柴車，應是釣秋水。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.title: 柳宗元《晨詣超師院讀禪經》
entries.content: 道人庭宇靜，苔色連深竹。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.title: 柳宗元《溪居》
entries.content: 來往不逢人，長歌楚天碧。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《東郊》
entries.content: 楊柳散和風，青山澹吾慮。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.work: 郡齋雨中與諸文士燕集
entries.title: 韋應物《郡齋雨中與諸文士燕集》
entries.content: 海上風雨至，逍遙池閣涼。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《初發揚子寄元大校書》
entries.content: 歸棹洛陽人，殘鍾廣陵樹。

entries.author: 常建
entries.title: 常建《宿王昌齡隱居》
entries.content: 鬆際露微月，清光猶爲君。

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《感遇·蘭葉春葳蕤》
entries.content: 草木有本心，何求美人折！

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《感遇·幽人歸獨臥》
entries.content: 幽人歸獨臥，滯慮洗孤清。

entries.author: 綦毋潛
entries.title: 綦毋潛《春泛若耶溪》
entries.content: 晚風吹行舟，花路入溪口。

entries.author: 元結
entries.title: 元結《石魚湖上醉歌》
entries.content: 山爲樽，水爲沼，酒徒歷歷坐洲島。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.work: 輪臺歌奉送封大夫出師
entries.title: 岑參《輪臺歌奉送封大夫出師》
entries.content: 四邊伐鼓雪海涌，三軍大呼陰山動。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 宣州謝脁樓餞別校書叔雲
entries.title: 李白《宣州謝脁樓餞別校書叔雲》
entries.content: 俱懷逸興壯思飛，欲上青天攬明月。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《金陵酒肆留別》
entries.content: 風吹柳花滿店香，吳姬壓酒喚客嘗。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《韓碑》
entries.content: 元和天子神武姿，彼何人哉軒與羲。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.work: 聽董大彈胡笳聲兼寄語
entries.title: 李頎《聽董大彈胡笳聲兼寄語》
entries.content: 空山百鳥散還合，萬里浮雲陰且晴。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《聽安萬善吹觱篥歌》
entries.content: 世人解聽不解賞，長飆風中自來往。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《琴歌》
entries.content: 月照城頭烏半飛，霜悽萬樹風入衣。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.work: 觀公孫大娘弟子舞劍器行
entries.title: 杜甫《觀公孫大娘弟子舞劍器行》
entries.content: 來如雷霆收震怒，罷如江海凝清光。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《丹青引贈曹霸將軍》
entries.content: 先帝御馬五花驄，畫工如山貌不同。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《夜歸鹿門山歌》
entries.content: 人隨沙岸向江村，餘亦乘舟歸鹿門。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.title: 韓愈《石鼓歌》
entries.content: 周綱凌遲四海沸，宣王憤起揮天戈。

entries.author: 王之渙
entries.title: 王之渙《涼州詞》
entries.content: 羌笛何須怨楊柳，春風不度玉門關。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《出塞·秦時明月漢時關》
entries.content: 秦時明月漢時關，萬里長征人未還。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《長信怨》
entries.content: 金井梧桐秋葉黃，珠簾不卷夜來霜。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《洛陽女兒行》
entries.content: 春窗曙滅九微火，九微片片飛花瑣。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《老將行》
entries.content: 賀蘭山下陣如雲，羽檄交馳日夕聞。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 清平調·一枝紅豔露凝香
entries.title: 李白《清平調·一枝紅豔露凝香》
entries.content: 一枝紅豔露凝香，雲雨巫山枉斷腸。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 清平調·名花傾國兩相歡
entries.title: 李白《清平調·名花傾國兩相歡》
entries.content: 解釋春風無限恨，沉香亭北倚欄杆。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《長幹行·其一》
entries.content: 五月不可觸，猿聲天上哀。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《子夜吳歌·夏歌》
entries.content: 五月西施採，人看隘若耶。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《子夜吳歌·秋歌》
entries.content: 秋風吹不盡，總是玉關情。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《古從軍行》
entries.content: 胡雁哀鳴夜夜飛，胡兒眼淚雙雙落。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《哀王孫》
entries.content: 昨夜東風吹血腥，東來橐駝滿舊都。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 佚名《金縷衣》
entries.content: 花開堪折直須折，莫待無花空折枝。

entries.author: 沈佺期
entries.title: 沈佺期《獨不見》
entries.content: 白狼河北音書斷，丹鳳城南秋夜長。

entries.author: 孟郊
entries.title: 孟郊《烈女操》
entries.content: 波瀾誓不起，妾心古井水。

entries.author: 孟郊
entries.title: 孟郊《遊子吟》
entries.content: 誰言寸草心，報得三春暉。

entries.author: 高適
entries.title: 高適《燕歌行》
entries.content: 山川蕭條極邊土，胡騎憑陵雜風雨。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《塞下曲·林暗草驚風》
entries.content: 林暗草驚風，將軍夜引弓。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《塞下曲·月黑雁飛高》
entries.content: 月黑雁飛高，單于夜遁逃。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《靜夜思》
entries.content: 床前明月光，疑是地上霜，

entries.author: 元稹
entries.title: 元稹《行宮》
entries.content: 寥落古行宮，宮花寂寞紅。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《相思》
entries.content: 紅豆生南國，春來發幾枝。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《雜詩》
entries.content: 來日綺窗前，寒梅著花未？

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《問劉十九》
entries.content: 晚來天欲雪，能飲一杯無？

entries.author: 西鄙人
entries.title: 西鄙人《哥舒歌》
entries.content: 北斗七星高，哥舒夜帶刀。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《怨情》
entries.content: 但見淚痕溼，不知心恨誰。

entries.author: 宋之問
entries.title: 宋之問《渡漢江》
entries.content: 嶺外音書斷，經冬復歷春。

entries.author: 金昌緒
entries.title: 金昌緒《春怨》
entries.content: 啼時驚妾夢，不得到遼西。

entries.author: 祖詠
entries.title: 祖詠《終南望餘雪》
entries.content: 終南陰嶺秀，積雪浮雲端。

entries.author: 權德輿
entries.title: 權德輿《玉臺體》
entries.content: 昨夜裙帶解，今朝蟢子飛。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《閨怨》
entries.content: 閨中少婦不知愁，春日凝妝上翠樓。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《九月九日憶山東兄弟》
entries.content: 遙知兄弟登高處，遍插茱萸少一人。

entries.author: 朱慶餘
entries.title: 朱慶餘《近試上張水部》
entries.content: 洞房昨夜停紅燭，待曉堂前拜舅姑。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《早發白帝城》
entries.content: 兩岸猿聲啼不住，輕舟已過萬重山。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《賈生》
entries.content: 可憐夜半虛前席，不問蒼生問鬼神。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《寄令狐郎中》
entries.content: 休問梁園舊賓客，茂陵秋雨病相如。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《遣懷》
entries.content: 十年一覺揚州夢，贏得青樓薄倖名。

entries.author: 張祜
entries.title: 張祜《贈內人》
entries.content: 禁門宮樹月痕過，媚眼惟看宿鷺窠。

entries.author: 張祜
entries.title: 張祜《集靈臺·其二》
entries.content: 虢國夫人承主恩，平明騎馬入宮門。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 佚名《雜詩》
entries.content: 等是有家歸未得，杜鵑休向耳邊啼。

entries.author: 劉禹錫
entries.title: 劉禹錫《烏衣巷》
entries.content: 朱雀橋邊野草花，烏衣巷口夕陽斜。

entries.author: 韓偓
entries.title: 韓偓《已涼》
entries.content: 八尺龍鬚方錦褥，已涼天氣未寒時。

entries.author: 顧況
entries.title: 顧況《宮詞》
entries.content: 君門一入無由出，唯有宮鶯得見人。

entries.author: 司空曙
entries.title: 司空曙《賊平後送人北歸》
entries.content: 他鄉生白髮，舊國見青山。

entries.author: 宋之問
entries.title: 宋之問《題大庾嶺北驛》
entries.content: 我行殊未已，何日復歸來。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《風雨》
entries.content: 心斷新豐酒，銷愁鬥幾千。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《登岳陽樓》
entries.content: 吳楚東南坼，乾坤日夜浮。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《別房太尉墓》
entries.content: 唯見林花落，鶯啼送客聞。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.work: 至德二載甫自京金光門
entries.title: 杜甫《至德二載甫自京金光門》
entries.content: 此道昔歸順，西郊胡正繁。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《春宿左省》
entries.content: 不寢聽金鑰，因風想玉珂。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《過故人莊》
entries.content: 待到重陽日，還來就菊花。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《秦中寄遠上人》
entries.content: 日夕涼風至，聞蟬但益悲。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《宴梅道士山房》
entries.content: 林臥愁春盡，開軒覽物華。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《賦得暮雨送李曹》
entries.content: 海門深不見，浦樹遠含滋。

entries.author: 李隆基
entries.title: 李隆基《經鄒魯祭孔子而嘆之》
entries.content: 今看兩楹奠，當與夢時同。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《送李中丞歸漢陽別業》
entries.content: 獨立三邊靜，輕生一劍知。

entries.author: 元稹
entries.title: 元稹《遣悲懷三首·其三》
entries.content: 惟將終夜常開眼，報答平生未展眉。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《贈郭給事》
entries.content: 晨搖玉佩趨金殿，夕奉天書拜瑣闈。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·鳳尾香羅薄幾重》
entries.content: 扇裁月魄羞難掩，車走雷聲語未通。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其四》
entries.content: 古廟杉鬆巢水鶴，歲時伏臘走村翁。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其五》
entries.content: 三分割據紆籌策，萬古雲霄一羽毛。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《閣夜》
entries.content: 歲暮陰陽催短景，天涯霜雪霽寒宵。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《聞官軍收河南河北》
entries.content: 白日放歌須縱酒，青春作伴好還鄉。

entries.author: 秦韜玉
entries.title: 秦韜玉《貧女》
entries.content: 苦恨年年壓金線，爲他人作嫁衣裳。

entries.author: 高適
entries.work: 送李少府貶峽中王少府貶
entries.title: 高適《送李少府貶峽中王少府貶》
entries.content: 巫峽啼猿數行淚，衡陽歸雁幾封書。

entries.author: 崔顥
entries.title: 崔顥《登黃鶴樓》
entries.content: 日暮鄉關何處是？煙波江上使人愁。

entries.author: 薛逢
entries.title: 薛逢《宮詞》
entries.content: 遙窺正殿簾開處，袍袴宮人掃御牀。

entries.author: 元結
entries.title: 元結《賊退示官吏》
entries.content: 今來典斯郡，山夷又紛然。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《渭川田家》
entries.content: 斜陽照墟落，窮巷牛羊歸。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《西施詠》
entries.content: 當時浣紗伴，莫得同車歸。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《送綦毋潛落第還鄉》
entries.content: 既至金門遠，孰雲吾道非。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.work: 與高適薛據同登慈恩寺
entries.title: 岑參《與高適薛據同登慈恩寺》
entries.content: 下窺指高鳥，俯聽聞驚風。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《贈衛八處士》
entries.content: 人生不相見，動如參與商。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《送楊氏女》
entries.content: 別離在今晨，見爾當何秋。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《長安遇馮著》
entries.content: 冥冥花正開，颺颺燕新乳。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《寄全椒山中道士》
entries.content: 今朝郡齋冷，忽念山中客。

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《感遇·孤鴻海上來》
entries.content: 孤鴻海上來，池潢不敢顧。

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《感遇·江南有丹橘》
entries.content: 豈伊地氣暖？自有歲寒心。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.work: 韋諷錄事宅觀曹將軍畫馬
entries.title: 杜甫《韋諷錄事宅觀曹將軍畫馬》
entries.content: 借問苦心愛者誰，後有韋諷前支遁。

entries.author: 陳子昂
entries.title: 陳子昂《登幽州臺歌》
entries.content: 前不見古人，後不見來者。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《塞上曲·蟬鳴空桑林》
entries.content: 蟬鳴空桑林，八月蕭關道。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《渭城曲》
entries.content: 勸君更盡一杯酒，西出陽關無故人。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《行路難·大道如青天》
entries.content: 大道如青天，我獨不得出。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《子夜吳歌·春歌》
entries.content: 秦地羅敷女，採桑綠水邊。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《子夜吳歌·冬歌》
entries.content: 明朝驛使發，一夜絮徵袍。

entries.author: 崔顥
entries.title: 崔顥《長幹行·家臨九江水》
entries.content: 同是長幹人，生小不相識。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《塞下曲·野幕敞瓊筵》
entries.content: 醉和金甲舞，雷鼓動山川。

entries.author: 王建
entries.title: 王建《新嫁娘詞》
entries.content: 三日入廚下，洗手作羹湯。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《登樂遊原》
entries.content: 向晚意不適，驅車登古原。

entries.author: 李端
entries.title: 李端《聽箏》
entries.content: 欲得周郎顧，時時誤拂弦。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《八陣圖》
entries.content: 功蓋三分國，名成八陣圖。

entries.author: 張祜
entries.title: 張祜《宮詞》
entries.content: 一聲何滿子，雙淚落君前。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.title: 岑參《逢入京使》
entries.content: 故園東望路漫漫，雙袖龍鍾淚不幹。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《瑤池》
entries.content: 八駿日行三萬裏，穆王何事不重來。

entries.author: 賀知章
entries.title: 賀知章《回鄉偶書·其一》
entries.content: 兒童相見不相識，笑問客從何處來。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《蟬》
entries.content: 五更疏欲斷，一樹碧無情。

entries.author: 元稹
entries.title: 元稹《遣悲懷三首·其一》
entries.content: 今日俸錢過十萬，與君營奠復營齋。

entries.author: 李益
entries.title: 李益《江南曲》
entries.content: 嫁得瞿塘賈，朝朝誤妾期。

entries.author: 崔顥
entries.title: 崔顥《長幹行·君家何處住》
entries.content: 停船暫借問，或恐是同鄉。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《塞下曲·鷲翎金僕姑》
entries.content: 獨立揚新令，千營共一呼。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《嫦娥》
entries.content: 雲母屏風燭影深，長河漸落曉星沉。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《瑤瑟怨》
entries.content: 雁聲遠過瀟湘去，十二樓中月自明。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其三》
entries.content: 羣山萬壑赴荊門，生長明妃尚有村。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 下終南山過斛斯山人宿置酒
entries.title: 李白《下終南山過斛斯山人宿置酒》
entries.content: 長歌吟松風，曲盡河星稀。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《長恨歌》
entries.content: 承歡侍宴無閒暇，春從春遊夜專夜。後宮佳麗三千人，三千寵愛在一身。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《琵琶行》
entries.content: 今年歡笑復明年，秋月春風等閒度。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《關山月》
entries.content: 戍客望邊邑，思歸多苦顏。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《夜雨寄北》
entries.content: 何當共剪西窗燭，卻話巴山夜雨時。

entries.author: 韋莊
entries.title: 韋莊《金陵圖》
entries.content: 君看六幅南朝事，老木寒雲滿故城。

entries.author: 張泌
entries.title: 張泌《寄人》
entries.content: 別夢依依到謝家，小廊回合曲闌斜。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《渡荊門送別》
entries.content: 仍憐故鄉水，萬里送行舟。

entries.author: 馬戴
entries.title: 馬戴《楚江懷古三首·其一》
entries.content: 露氣寒光集，微陽下楚丘。猿啼洞庭樹，人在木蘭舟。

entries.author: 常建
entries.title: 常建《題破山寺後禪院》
entries.content: 曲徑通幽處，禪房花木深。

entries.author: 張喬
entries.title: 張喬《書邊事》
entries.content: 大漢無兵阻，窮邊有客遊。蕃情似此水，長願向南流。

entries.author: 戴叔倫
entries.title: 戴叔倫《江鄉故人偶集客舍》
entries.content: 還作江南會，翻疑夢裏逢。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·相見時難別亦難》
entries.content: 相見時難別亦難，東風無力百花殘。

entries.author: 祖詠
entries.title: 祖詠《望薊門》
entries.content: 燕臺一望客心驚，笳鼓喧喧漢將營。

entries.author: 溫庭筠
entries.title: 溫庭筠《蘇武廟》
entries.content: 茂陵不見封侯印，空向秋波哭逝川。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《晚次鄂州》
entries.content: 估客晝眠知浪靜，舟人夜語覺潮生。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《佳人》
entries.content: 但見新人笑，那聞舊人哭。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《夕次盱眙縣》
entries.content: 落帆逗淮鎮，停舫臨孤驛。浩浩風起波，冥冥日沉夕。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.work: 走馬川行奉送封大夫出師
entries.title: 岑參《走馬川行奉送封大夫出師》
entries.content: 將軍金甲夜不脫，半夜軍行戈相撥，風頭如刀面如割。

entries.author: 岑參
entries.title: 岑參《白雪歌送武判官歸京》
entries.content: 北風捲地白草折，胡天八月即飛雪。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.title: 韓愈《山石》
entries.content: 人生如此自可樂，豈必局束爲人鞿？

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.title: 韓愈《八月十五夜贈張功曹》
entries.content: 一年明月今宵多，人生由命非由他。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《塞下曲·飲馬渡秋水》
entries.content: 平沙日未沒，黯黯見臨洮。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《桃源行》
entries.content: 峽裏誰知有人事，世中遙望空雲山。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 清平調·雲想衣裳花想容
entries.title: 李白《清平調·雲想衣裳花想容》
entries.content: 若非羣玉山頭見，會向瑤臺月下逢。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《麗人行》
entries.content: 就中雲幕椒房親，賜名大國虢與秦。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《鹿柴》
entries.content: 返景入深林，復照青苔上。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《山中送別》
entries.content: 山中相送罷，日暮掩柴扉。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《宿建德江》
entries.content: 移舟泊煙渚，日暮客愁新。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《春曉》
entries.content: 春眠不覺曉，處處聞啼鳥。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《秋夜寄邱員外》
entries.content: 空山松子落，幽人應未眠。

entries.author: 王昌齡
entries.title: 王昌齡《春宮曲》
entries.content: 平陽歌舞新承寵，簾外春寒賜錦袍。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 黃鶴樓送孟浩然之廣陵
entries.title: 李白《黃鶴樓送孟浩然之廣陵》
entries.content: 孤帆遠影碧空盡，唯見長江天際流。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《贈別·其二》
entries.content: 多情卻似總無情，唯覺樽前笑不成。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《金谷園》
entries.content: 繁華事散逐香塵，流水無情草自春。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《寄揚州韓綽判官》
entries.content: 青山隱隱水迢迢，秋盡江南草未凋。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《秋夕》
entries.content: 銀燭秋光冷畫屏，輕羅小扇撲流螢。

entries.author: 杜牧
entries.title: 杜牧《泊秦淮》
entries.content: 商女不知亡國恨，隔江猶唱後庭花。

entries.author: 柳中庸
entries.title: 柳中庸《徵人怨》
entries.content: 歲歲金河復玉關，朝朝馬策與刀環。

entries.author: 陳陶
entries.title: 陳陶《隴西行》
entries.content: 誓掃匈奴不顧身，五千貂錦喪胡塵。

entries.author: 韓翃
entries.title: 韓翃《寒食》
entries.content: 日暮漢宮傳蠟燭，輕煙散入五侯家。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《終南山》
entries.content: 欲投人處宿，隔水問樵夫。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《酬張少府》
entries.content: 晚年唯好靜，萬事不關心。自顧無長策，空知返舊林。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《輞川閒居贈裴秀才迪》
entries.content: 倚杖柴門外，臨風聽暮蟬。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《山居秋暝》
entries.content: 明月鬆間照，清泉石上流。

entries.author: 王灣
entries.title: 王灣《次北固山下》
entries.content: 客路青山外，行舟綠水前。

entries.author: 司空曙
entries.title: 司空曙《雲陽館與韓紳宿別》
entries.content: 乍見翻疑夢，相悲各問年。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《聽蜀僧浚彈琴》
entries.content: 客心洗流水，餘響入霜鍾。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《夜泊牛渚懷古》
entries.content: 登舟望秋月，空憶謝將軍。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《涼思》
entries.content: 客去波平檻，蟬休露滿枝。永懷當此節，倚立自移時。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《落花》
entries.content: 高閣客竟去，小園花亂飛。參差連曲陌，迢遞送斜暉。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《奉濟驛重送嚴公四韻》
entries.content: 列郡謳歌惜，三朝出入榮。江村獨歸處，寂寞養殘生。

entries.author: 杜審言
entries.title: 杜審言《和晉陵陸丞早春遊望》
entries.content: 忽聞歌古調，歸思欲沾巾。

entries.author: 沈佺期
entries.title: 沈佺期《雜詩三首·其三》
entries.content: 可憐閨裏月，長在漢家營。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《歲暮歸南山》
entries.content: 白髮催年老，青陽逼歲除。永懷愁不寐，鬆月夜窗虛。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《與諸子登峴山》
entries.content: 人事有代謝，往來成古今。

entries.author: 韋莊
entries.title: 韋莊《章臺夜思》
entries.content: 芳草已雲暮，故人殊未來。鄉書不可寄，秋雁又南迴。

entries.author: 韋應物
entries.title: 韋應物《淮上喜會梁州故人》
entries.content: 浮雲一別後，流水十年間。

entries.author: 崔塗
entries.title: 崔塗《除夜有懷》
entries.content: 漸與骨肉遠，轉於僮僕親。

entries.author: 張九齡
entries.title: 張九齡《望月懷遠》
entries.content: 情人怨遙夜，竟夕起相思。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《尋南溪常道士》
entries.content: 過雨看鬆色，隨山到水源。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.title: 劉長卿《新年作》
entries.content: 鄉心新歲切，天畔獨潸然。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.work: 秋日登吳公臺上寺遠眺
entries.title: 劉長卿《秋日登吳公臺上寺遠眺》
entries.content: 古臺搖落後，秋日望鄉心。

entries.author: 盧綸
entries.title: 盧綸《送李端》
entries.content: 掩淚空相向，風塵何處期。

entries.author: 王維
entries.work: 奉和聖制從蓬萊向興慶閣道
entries.title: 王維《奉和聖制從蓬萊向興慶閣道》
entries.content: 渭水自縈秦塞曲，黃山舊繞漢宮斜。

entries.author: 白居易
entries.title: 白居易《望月有感》
entries.content: 弔影分爲千里雁，辭根散作九秋蓬。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《登金陵鳳凰臺》
entries.content: 總爲浮雲能蔽日，長安不見使人愁。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·颯颯東風細雨來》
entries.content: 颯颯東風細雨來，芙蓉塘外有輕雷。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《無題·昨夜星辰昨夜風》
entries.content: 身無綵鳳雙飛翼，心有靈犀一點通。

entries.author: 李商隱
entries.title: 李商隱《錦瑟》
entries.content: 滄海月明珠有淚，藍田日暖玉生煙。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其一》
entries.content: 支離東北風塵際，漂泊西南天地間。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《詠懷古蹟·其二》
entries.content: 最是楚宮俱泯滅，舟人指點到今疑。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《宿府》
entries.content: 清秋幕府井梧寒，獨宿江城蠟炬殘。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《登樓》
entries.content: 花近高樓傷客心，萬方多難此登臨。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《野望》
entries.content: 西山白雪三城戍，南浦清江萬里橋。

entries.author: 皇甫冉
entries.title: 皇甫冉《春思》
entries.content: 機中錦字論長恨，樓上花枝笑獨眠。

entries.author: 崔曙
entries.work: 九日登望仙台呈劉明府
entries.title: 崔曙《九日登望仙台呈劉明府》
entries.content: 且欲近尋彭澤宰，陶然共醉菊花杯。

entries.author: 劉長卿
entries.work: 自夏口至鸚鵡洲夕望岳陽
entries.title: 劉長卿《自夏口至鸚鵡洲夕望岳陽》
entries.content: 孤城背嶺寒吹角，獨樹臨江夜泊船。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.title: 孟浩然《夏日南亭懷辛大》
entries.content: 感此懷故人，中宵勞夢想。

entries.author: 孟浩然
entries.work: 宿業師山房待丁大不至
entries.title: 孟浩然《宿業師山房待丁大不至》
entries.content: 樵人歸欲盡，煙鳥棲初定。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《廬山謠寄盧侍御虛舟》
entries.content: 黃雲萬里動風色，白波九道流雪山。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《夢遊天姥吟留別》
entries.content: 我欲因之夢吳越，一夜飛度鏡湖月。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《古意》
entries.content: 殺人莫敢前，須如蝟毛磔。

entries.author: 李頎
entries.title: 李頎《送陳章甫》
entries.content: 東門酤酒飲我曹，心輕萬事如鴻毛。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《古柏行》
entries.content: 君臣已與時際會，樹木猶爲人愛惜。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《寄韓諫議》
entries.content: 美人胡爲隔秋水，焉得置之貢玉堂。

entries.author: 柳宗元
entries.title: 柳宗元《漁翁》
entries.content: 煙銷日出不見人，欸乃一聲山水綠。

entries.author: 韓愈
entries.work: 謁衡岳廟遂宿嶽寺題門樓
entries.title: 韓愈《謁衡岳廟遂宿嶽寺題門樓》
entries.content: 我來正逢秋雨節，陰氣晦昧無清風。

entries.author: 王維
entries.title: 王維《秋夜曲》
entries.content: 桂魄初生秋露微，輕羅已薄未更衣。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 行路難·金樽清酒鬥十千
entries.title: 李白《行路難·金樽清酒鬥十千》
entries.content: 停杯投箸不能食，拔劍四顧心茫然。

entries.author: 李白
entries.work: 行路難·有耳莫洗潁川水
entries.title: 李白《行路難·有耳莫洗潁川水》
entries.content: 君不見吳中張翰稱達生，秋風忽憶江東行。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《將進酒》
entries.content: 人生得意須盡歡，莫使金樽空對月。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《玉階怨》
entries.content: 玉階生白露，夜久侵羅襪。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《長相思·其一》
entries.content: 美人如花隔雲端！

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《長相思·其二》
entries.content: 日色慾盡花含煙，月明欲素愁不眠。

entries.author: 李白
entries.title: 李白《蜀道難》
entries.content: 地崩山摧壯士死，然後天梯石棧相鉤連。

entries.author: 杜甫
entries.title: 杜甫《兵車行》
entries.content: 君不見，青海頭，古來白骨無人收。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·七月》
entries.content: 七月在野，八月在宇，九月在户，十月蟋蟀，入我床下。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·无羊》
entries.content: 牧人乃梦，众维鱼矣，旐维旟矣，大人占之；众维鱼矣，实维丰年；旐维旟矣，室家溱溱。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·巷伯》
entries.content: 苍天苍天，视彼骄人，矜此劳人。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·鳲鸠》
entries.content: 淑人君子，正是国人，正是国人。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·采薇》
entries.content: 曰归曰归，心亦忧止。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·正月》
entries.content: 民今方殆，视天梦梦。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·雨无正》
entries.content: 云不何使，得罪于天子；亦云可使，怨及朋友。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·抑》
entries.content: 视尔梦梦，我心惨惨。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·瞻卬》
entries.content: 人之云亡，心之忧矣。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·桃夭》
entries.content: 之子于归，宜其家人。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·殷其雷》
entries.content: 振振君子，归哉归哉！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·绿衣》
entries.content: 我思古人，实获我心！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·终风》
entries.content: 终风且暴，顾我则笑，谑浪笑敖，中心是悼。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·击鼓》
entries.content: 不我以归，忧心有忡。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·凯风》
entries.content: 凯风自南，吹彼棘心。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·雄雉》
entries.content: 道之云远，曷云能来？

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·简兮》
entries.content: 彼美人兮，西方之人兮。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·柏舟》
entries.content: 母也天只，不谅人只！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·定之方中》
entries.content: 匪直也人，秉心塞渊，騋牝三千。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·相鼠》
entries.content: 相鼠有体，人而无礼，人而无礼！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·黍离》
entries.content: 悠悠苍天，此何人哉？

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·扬之水》
entries.content: 怀哉怀哉，曷月予还归哉？

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·扬之水》
entries.content: 无信人之言，人实不信。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·鸡鸣》
entries.content: 匪东方则明，月出之光。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·甫田》
entries.content: 无思远人，劳心忉忉。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·敝笱》
entries.content: 齐子归止，其从如云。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·载驱》
entries.content: 汶水汤汤，行人彭彭。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·蒹葭》
entries.content: 所谓伊人，在水一方。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·黄鸟》
entries.content: 彼苍者天，歼我良人！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·蜉蝣》
entries.content: 心之忧矣，于我归处。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·东山》
entries.content: 我东曰归，我心西悲。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·九罭》
entries.content: 是以有衮衣兮，无以我公归兮，无使我心悲兮。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·杕杜》
entries.content: 卉木萋止，女心悲止，征夫归止！

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·南山有台》
entries.content: 南山有台，北山有莱。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·湛露》
entries.content: 厌厌夜饮，不醉无归。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·庭燎》
entries.content: 夜未央，庭燎之光。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·沔水》
entries.content: 沔彼流水，朝宗于海。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·十月之交》
entries.content: 十月之交，朔月辛卯。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·小宛》
entries.content: 我心忧伤，念昔先人。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·小弁》
entries.content: 心之忧矣，云如之何？

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·巧言》
entries.content: 他人有心，予忖度之。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·谷风》
entries.content: 习习谷风，维山崔嵬。

entries.author: 佚名
entries.title: 《诗经·蓼莪》

entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 14
entries.content: There are times when I languidly linger and times when I awaken and hurry in search of my goal; but cruelly thou hidest thyself from before me.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 15
entries.content: In thy world I have no work to do; my useless life can only break out in tunes without a purpose.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 16
entries.content: I have had my invitation to this world’s festival, and thus my life has been blessed.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 22
entries.content: Oh my only friend, my best beloved, the gates are open in my house⁠—do not pass by like a dream.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 23
entries.content: Art thou abroad on this stormy night on thy journey of love, my friend?

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 26
entries.content: He came when the night was still; he had his harp in his hands, and my dreams became resonant with its melodies.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 27
entries.content: A moment’s flash of lightning drags down a deeper gloom on my sight, and my heart gropes for the path to where the music of the night calls me.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 40
entries.content: Send thy angry storm, dark with death, if it is thy wish, and with lashes of lightning startle the sky from end to end.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 42
entries.content: Lo, the evening has come down upon the shore and in the fading light the seabirds come flying to their nests.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 46
entries.content: I know not why today my life is all astir, and a feeling of tremulous joy is passing through my heart.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 52
entries.content: The young light of morning comes through the window and spreads itself upon thy bed.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 59
entries.content: The morning light has flooded my eyes⁠—this is thy message to my heart.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 60
entries.content: Children have their play on the seashore of worlds.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 63
entries.content: Thou hast given me seats in homes not my own.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 64
entries.content: In the moonless gloom of midnight I ask her, “Maiden, what is your quest, holding the lamp near your heart?

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 68
entries.content: It is so light and so fleeting, tender and tearful and dark, that is why thou lovest it, O thou spotless and serene.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 73
entries.content: My world will light its hundred different lamps with thy flame and place them before the altar of thy temple.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 76
entries.content: Under thy great sky in solitude and silence, with humble heart shall I stand before thee face to face.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 77
entries.content: I shrink to give up my life, and thus do not plunge into the great waters of life.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 82
entries.content: We have no time to lose, and having no time we must scramble for a chances.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 86
entries.content: He has crossed the unknown sea and brought thy call to my home.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 87
entries.content: In desperate hope I go and search for her in all the corners of my room; I find her not.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 91
entries.content: After the wedding the bride shall leave her home and meet her lord alone in the solitude of night.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 99
entries.content: These my lamps are blown out at every little puff of wind, and trying to light them I forget all else again and again.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 101
entries.content: It was they who led me from door to door, and with them have I felt about me, searching and touching my world.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 1
entries.content: At the immortal touch of thy hands my little heart loses its limits in joy and gives birth to utterance ineffable.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 5
entries.content: Away from the sight of thy face my heart knows no rest nor respite, and my work becomes an endless toil in a shoreless sea of toil.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 6
entries.content: I fear lest the day end before I am aware, and the time of offering go by.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 7
entries.content: Only let me make my life simple and straight, like a flute of reed for thee to fill with music.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 8
entries.content: In fear that it may be frayed, or stained with dust he keeps himself from the world, and is afraid even to move.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 9
entries.content: Accept only what is offered by sacred love.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 12
entries.content: The time that my journey takes is long and the way of it long.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 17
entries.content: I am only waiting for love to give myself up at last into his hands.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 19
entries.content: I will keep still and wait like the night with starry vigil and its head bent low with patience.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 20
entries.content: Only now and again a sadness fell upon me, and I started up from my dream and felt a sweet trace of a strange fragrance in the south wind.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 25
entries.content: In the night of weariness let me give myself up to sleep without struggle, resting my trust upon thee.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 28
entries.content: Freedom is all I want, but to hope for it I feel ashamed.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 31
entries.content: I thought my invincible power would hold the world captive leaving me in a freedom undisturbed.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 36
entries.content: And give me the strength to surrender my strength to thy will with love.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 38
entries.content: All desires that distract me, day and night, are false and empty to the core.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 39
entries.content: When desire blinds the mind with delusion and dust, O thou holy one, thou wakeful, come with thy light and thy thunder.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 41
entries.content: Ah, I hug this pride in the secret of my heart.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 44
entries.content: My heart is glad within, and the breath of the passing breeze is sweet.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 45
entries.content: Every moment and every age, every day and every night he comes, comes, ever comes.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 47
entries.content: Ah, my closed eyes that would open their lids only to the light of his smile when he stands before me like a dream emerging from darkness of sleep.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore

entries.content: I gave myself up for lost in the depth of a glad humiliation⁠—in the shadow of a dim delight.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 49
entries.content: But the simple carol of this novice struck at your love.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 50
entries.content: I bitterly wept and wished that I had had the heart to give thee my all.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 51
entries.content: In the depth of the night has come the king of our dark, dreary house.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 54
entries.content: But the memory that I could give water to thee to allay thy thirst will cling to my heart and enfold it in sweetness.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 55
entries.content: Is there no joy in the deep of your heart?

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 65
entries.content: Thou givest thyself to me in love and then feelest thine own entire sweetness in me.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 66
entries.content: I have roamed from country to country keeping her in the core of my heart, and around her have risen and fallen the growth and decay of my life.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 71
entries.content: Behind it thy seat is woven in wondrous mysteries of curves, casting away all barren lines of straightness.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 74
entries.content: I know not if I shall come back home.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 75
entries.content: Thy worship does not impoverish the world.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 78
entries.content: From that day the search is unceasing for her, and the cry goes on from one to the other that in her the world has lost its one joy!

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 80
entries.content: I am like a remnant of a cloud of autumn uselessly roaming in the sky, O my sun ever-glorious!

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 81
entries.content: On many an idle day have I grieved over lost time.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 83
entries.content: The stars have wrought their anklets of light to deck thy feet, but mine will hang upon thy breast.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 84
entries.content: It is the pang of separation that spreads throughout the world and gives birth to shapes innumerable in the infinite sky.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 88
entries.content: Many a night of worship goes away with lamp unlit.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 89
entries.content: But I have my untimely leave in the middle of the day, in the thick of work.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 90
entries.content: Oh, I will set before my guest the full vessel of my life⁠—I will never let him go with empty hands.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 92
entries.content: Rare is its lowliest seat, rare is its meanest of lives.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 94
entries.content: At this time of my parting, wish me good luck, my friends!

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 97
entries.content: I knew nor shyness nor fear, my life was boisterous.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 98
entries.content: From the blue sky an eye shall gaze upon me and summon me in silence.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 102
entries.content: The secret gushes out from my heart.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 103
entries.content: In one salutation to thee, my God, let all my senses spread out and touch this world at thy feet.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 35
entries.content: Where the world has not been broken up into fragments by narrow domestic walls;

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 10
entries.content: Here is thy footstool and there rest thy feet where live the poorest, and lowliest, and lost.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 11
entries.content: Come out of thy meditations and leave aside thy flowers and incense!

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 21
entries.content: And now with the burden of faded futile flowers I wait and linger.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 29
entries.content: He whom I enclose with my name is weeping in this dungeon.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 30
entries.content: But who is this that follows me in the silent dark?

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 34
entries.content: Let only that little be left of me whereby I may name thee my all.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 37
entries.content: But I find that thy will knows no end in me.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 53
entries.content: Beautiful is thy wristlet, decked with stars and cunningly wrought in myriad-coloured jewels.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 61
entries.content: From there it comes to kiss baby’s eyes.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 70
entries.content: All things rush on, they stop not, they look not behind, no power can hold them back, they rush on.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 72
entries.content: Days come and ages pass, and it is ever he who moves my heart in many a name, in many a guise, in many a rapture of joy and of sorrow.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 85
entries.content: They looked poor and helpless, and the arrows were showered upon them on the day they came out from their master’s hall.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 93
entries.content: A summons has come and I am ready for my journey.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 96
entries.content: I have tasted of the hidden honey of this lotus that expands on the ocean of light, and thus am I blessed⁠—let this be my parting word.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 100
entries.content: And now I am eager to die into the deathless.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 33
entries.content: When it was day they came into my house and said, “We shall only take the smallest room here.”

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 57
entries.content: The butterflies spread their sails on the sea of light.

entries.author: Rabindranath Tagore
entries.title: Rabindranath Tagore · Gitanjali 3

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Marriage
entries.content: Love one another, but make not a bond of love: Let it rather be a moving sea between the shores of your souls.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Work
entries.content: And in keeping yourself with labour you are in truth loving life, And to love life through labour is to be intimate with life’s inmost secret.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Clothes
entries.content: For the breath of life is in the sunlight and the hand of life is in the wind.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Beauty
entries.content: People of Orphalese, beauty is life when life unveils her holy face. But you are life and you are the veil.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Love
entries.content: For love is sufficient unto love. When you love you should not say, “God is in my heart,” but rather, “I am in the heart of God.”

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Time
entries.content: But if in your thought you must measure time into seasons, let each season encircle all the other seasons,

entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Giving
entries.content: For in truth it is life that gives unto life⁠—while you, who deem yourself a giver, are but a witness.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Pain
entries.content: And you would accept the seasons of your heart, even as you have always accepted the seasons that pass over your fields.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Death
entries.content: And like seeds dreaming beneath the snow your heart dreams of spring.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Self Knowledge
entries.content: For self is a sea boundless and measureless. Say not, “I have found the truth,” but rather, “I have found a truth.”

entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Talking
entries.content: For his soul will keep the truth of your heart as the taste of the wine is remembered

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Children
entries.content: For even as he loves the arrow that flies, so He loves also the bow that is stable.

entries.content: When you are sorrowful look again in your heart, and you shall see that in truth you are weeping for that which has been your delight.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran
entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Houses
entries.content: For even as you have homecomings in your twilight, so has the wanderer in you, the ever distant and alone.

entries.content: Let him also weigh the heart of her husband in scales, and measure his soul with measurements.

entries.content: And I fain would have you sing it with fullness of heart; yet I would not have you lose your hearts in the singing.

entries.content: And he to whom worshipping is a window, to open but also to shut, has not yet visited the house of his soul whose windows are from dawn to dawn.

entries.content: And when he is silent your heart ceases not to listen to his heart;

entries.content: And he said: Would that you could live on the fragrance of the earth, and like an air plant be sustained by the light.

entries.content: For they too are gatherers of fruit and frankincense, and that which they bring, though fashioned of dreams, is raiment and food for your soul.

entries.content: And forget not that the earth delights to feel your bare feet and the winds long to play with your hair.

entries.content: But rather a garden for ever in bloom and a flock of angels for ever in flight. People of Orphalese, beauty is life when life unveils her holy face.

entries.content: All these things shall love do unto you that you may know the secrets of your heart, and in that knowledge become a fragment of Life’s heart.

entries.author: Kahlil Gibran

entries.content: Yet the timeless in you is aware of life’s timelessness, And knows that yesterday is but today’s memory and tomorrow is today’s dream.

entries.content: These are the believers in life and the bounty of life, and their coffer is never empty.

entries.content: And the selfsame well from which your laughter rises was oftentimes filled with your tears.

entries.title: Kahlil Gibran · On Houses

entries.content: Yet unless the exchange be in love and kindly justice, it will but lead some to greed and others to hunger.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos VIII
entries.content:
"El corazón es un loco
"Que no sabe de un color:
"O es su amor de dos colores,
"O dice que no es amor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLVI
entries.content:
Tú, porque yo pueda en calma
Amar y hacer bien, consientes
En enturbiar tus corrientes
Con cuanto me agobia el alma.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos I
entries.content:
Yo he visto en la noche oscura
Llover sobre mi cabeza
Los rayos de lumbre pura
De la divina belleza.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos III
entries.content:
Duermo en mi cama de roca
Mi sueño dulce y profundo:
Roza una abeja mi boca
Y crece en mi cuerpo el mundo.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos X
entries.content:
El alma trémula y sola
Padece al anochecer:
Hay baile; vamos a ver
La bailarina española.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLII
entries.content:
En el extraño bazar
Del amor, junto a la mar,
La perla triste y sin par
Le tocó por suerte a Agar.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XX

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXII
entries.content:
Una duquesa violeta
Va con un frac colorado;
Marca un vizconde pintado
El tiempo en la pandereta.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXIV
entries.content:
Yo sé de un pobre pintor
Que mira el agua al pintar,
- El agua ronca del mar,-
Con un entrañable amor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXVI
entries.content:
Yo que vivo,
aunque me he muerto,
Soy un gran descubridor,
Porque anoche he descubierto
La medicina de amor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXIII
entries.content:
¿Aquélla? ...Pues pon la hiel
Del mundo entero en un haz,
Y tállala en cuerpo, y haz,
Un alma entera de hiel!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXV
entries.content:
¿Qué importa que este dolor
Seque el mar y nuble el cielo?
El verso, dulce consuelo,
Nace al lado del dolor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos II
entries.content:
Yo sé de un gamo aterrado
Que vuelve al redil, y expira, -
Y de un corazón cansado
Que muere oscuro y sin ira.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos IX
entries.content:
... Ella dio al desmemoriado
Una almohadilla de olor:
El volvió, volvió casado:
Ella se murió de amor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos VI
entries.content:
Si quieren que a la otra vida
Me lleve todo un tesoro,
¡Llevo la trenza escondida
Que guardo en mi caja de oro!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos VII
entries.content:
Allá, en la vega florida
La de la heroica defensa
Por mantener lo que piensa
Juega la gente la vida.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XII
entries.content:
En el bote iba remando
Por el lago seductor,
Con el sol que era oro puro
Y en el alma más de un sol.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XIII
entries.content:
Era rubio el ángel; era
El de la calva radiosa,
Como el tronco a que amorosa
Se prende la enredadera.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XIV
entries.content:
La mañanita en que, en vano,
Junto a la estufa apagada,
Una niña enamorada
Le tendió al viejo la mano.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XIX
entries.content:
Por tus ojos encendidos
Y lo mal puesto de un broche,
Pensé que estuviste anoche
Jugando a juegos prohibidos.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XV
entries.content:
¡Díganle a la repostera
Que ha tanto tiempo no he visto,
Que me tenga un beso listo
Al entrar la primavera!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XVI
entries.content:
En el alféizar calado
De la ventana moruna,
Pálido como la luna,
Medita un enamorado.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XVII

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XVIII
entries.content:
El alfiler de Eva loca
Es hecho del oro oscuro
Que lo sacó un hombre puro
Del corazón de una roca.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXI
entries.content:
¡Esa es la hermosa mujer
Que me robó el corazón
En el soberbio salón
De los pintores de ayer!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXIII
entries.content:
Yo quiero salir del mundo
Por la puerta natural:
En un carro de hojas verdes
A morir me han de llevar.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXV
entries.content:
¡Yo pienso cuando me alegro
Como un escolar sencillo,
En el canario amarillo,
Que tiene el ojo tan negro!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXVII
entries.content:
Pasa, entre balas, un coche:
Entran, llorando, a una muerta;
Llama una mano a la puerta
En lo negro de la noche.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXVIII
entries.content:
El rayo reluce; zumba
El viento por el cortijo;
El padre recoge al hijo,
Y se lo lleva a la tumba.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXX
entries.content:
El viento, fiero, quebraba
Los almácigos copudos;
Andaba la hilera, andaba,
De los esclavos desnudos.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXI
entries.content:
Es rubio, es fuerte, es garzón
De nobleza natural:
¡Hijo, por la luz natal!
¡Hijo, por el pabellón!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXII
entries.content:
Tiembla la noche: en la parra
Muerde el gusano el retoño;
Grazna, llamando al otoño
La hueca y hosca cigarra.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXIV
entries.content:
¡Penas! ¿Quién osa decir
Que tengo yo penas?
Luego, Después del rayo, y del fuego,
Tendré tiempo de sufrir.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXIX
entries.content:
Y para el cruel que me arranca
El corazón con que vivo,
Cardo ni ortiga cultivo;
Cultivo la rosa blanca.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXVI
entries.content:
Ya sé: de carne se puede
Hacer una flor; se puede,
Con el poder del cariño,
Hacer un cielo, ¡y un niño!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXVII
entries.content:
Porque noto, alma torcida,
Que en mi pecho milagroso,
Mientras más honda la herida,
Es mi canto más hermoso.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXXVIII
entries.content:
¿De mujer? Pues puede ser
Que mueras de su mordida;
¡Pero no empañes tu vida
Diciendo mal de mujer!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos IV
entries.content:
¡Volveré, cual quien no existe
Al lago mudo y helado:
Clavaré la quilla triste:
Posaré el remo callado!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos V
entries.content:
Mi verso al valiente agrada:
Mi verso, breve y sincero,
Es del vigor del acero
Con que se funde la espada.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XI

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XL
entries.content:
Pinta mi amigo el pintor
Sus angelones dorados,
En nubes arrodillados,
Con soles alrededor.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLI
entries.content:
Cuando llegó la pomposa
Carta, en su noble cubierta,
Pensé en la tumba desierta
No pensé en Blanca ni en Rosa.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLIII
entries.content:
Despacio la tendería,
Callado la besaría.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLIV
entries.content:
Duerme, como en un juguete,
La mushma en su cojinete
De arte del Japón yo digo:
"No hay cojín como un amigo".

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XXIX
entries.content:
Festejar el santo es ley
Del rey; en la fiesta santa
¡La hermana del niño canta
Ante la imagen del rey!

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos VIII
entries.content:
"En un ave de dos alas
"Bogo por el cielo azul:
"Un ala del ave es negra
"Otra de oro Caribú.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos XLVI
entries.content:
Mi vida así se encamina
Al cielo limpia y serena,
Y tu me cargas mi pena
Con tu paciencia divina.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos I
entries.content:
Yo soy un hombre sincero
De donde crece la palma.
Y antes de morirme quiero
Echar mis versos del alma.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos III
entries.content:
Y la alfombra es puro helecho,
Y los muros abedul,
Y la luz viene del techo,
Del techo de cielo azul.

entries.author: José Martí
entries.title: José Martí · Versos Sencillos X
entries.content:
Preludian, bajan la luz,
Y sale en bata y mantón,
La virgen de la Asunción
Bailando un baile andaluz.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
En fin, María, sé bella,
sé parecida a la estrella;
toda luz, toda claror.
¡Vuela del mundo pequeño,
sé parecida al ensueño
al ensueño y al amor!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Oh amarga máscara amarilla,
ojos do luz siniestra brilla
y escenarios de pesadilla!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Si lo terreno acaba, en suma,
cielo e infierno,
y nuestras vidas son la espuma
de un mar eterno!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Amor a su fiesta convida
y nos corona.
Todos tenemos en la vida
nuestra Verona.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
María, sé la gallarda;
arda
tu corazón sin razón,
y ten la dicha que espero,
pero
dentro de tu corazón.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Aún vencen muerte, tiempo y hado
las amorosas;
en las tumbas se han encontrado
mirtos y rosas.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
En nosotros la Vida vierte
fuerza y calor.
¡Vamos al reino de la Muerte
por el camino del Amor!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Estatua viva y gallarda,
por ti arda
una misteriosa flor.
Y vibrante y anhelante
sé la amante
de la vida y del amor.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Por eso hacia el florido monte
las almas van,
y se explican Anacreonte
y Omar Kayam.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Pues se fué la niña bella,
bajo el cielo y sobre el mar,
a cortar la blanca estrella
que la hacía suspirar.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y que sobre los mares lleven los vientos libres
la divina verdad,
¡emperador de musas y rey de los felibres!
de tu inmortalidad.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Adolescencia! Amor te dora
con su virtud;
goza del beso de la aurora,
¡oh juventud!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Desventurado el que ha cogido
tarde la flor!
y ¡ay de aquel que nunca ha sabido
lo que es amor!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Gran patriarcal! ¡Tu canto lleva el mistral sonoro,
canto de amor y fe,
y alza su palma lírica tu Provenza de oro
por su gran Capoulié!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Oh, primaveral María!
Dios
te diera tantos diamantes
como los
amantes
que te besarán los pies.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Vamos al reino de la Muerte
por el camino del Amor!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Deshójate como rosa.
Sé la esposa
de toda ilusión fugaz,
pues el tiempo al amor muerde,
y la ilusión que se pierde
ya no nos vuelve jamás.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
El alma ahita cruel inmola
lo que la alegra,
como Zingua, reina de Angola,
lúbrica negra.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
El viejo tiempo todo roe
y va deprisa;
sabed vencerle, Cintia, Cloe
y Cidalisa.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
En las cercanías de Belén se para
el cortejo. ¿A causa? A causa de que
una dulce niña de belleza rara
surge ante los magos, toda ensueño y fe.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Es una princesita rosa
que amara Katy Grenaway.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Estupendos pavos reales
a tus males
llevarán consolación,
y soberanos lebreles
siempre fieles,
soñarán tu corazón.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Falta la terrible trompeta.
Mas oye el alma del poeta
crujir los huesos del planeta.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Gozad del sol, de la pagana
luz de sus fuegos;
gozad del sol, porque mañana
estaréis ciegos.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Gustaron las harinas celestiales
en el maravilloso simulacro,
herido el cuerpo bajo los sayales,
el espíritu ardiente en amor sacro.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
La princesa se entristece
por su dulce flor de luz,
cuando entonces aparece
sonriendo el Buen Jesús.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
La sal del mar en nuestras venas
va a borbotones;
tenemos sangre de sirenas
y de tritones.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Ladran con un furioso celo
los canes del diablo hacia el cielo
por la boca del Mongibelo.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Lavemos bien de nuestra veste
la amarga prosa;
soñemos en una celeste,
mística rosa.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Lucifer brilla. Canta el ronco
mar. Y se pierde
Silvano oculto tras el tronco
del haya verde.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
María, en la primavera
era
como una divina flor.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Nuestro cráneo guarda el vibrar
de tierra y sol,
como el ruido de la mar
el caracol.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Salen los tres reyes de adorar al rey,
flor de infancia llena de una luz divina
que humaniza y dora la mula y el buey.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Sentir la unción de la divina mano,
ver florecer de eterna luz mi anhelo,
y oir como un Pitágoras cristiano
la música teológica del cielo.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Vieron la nada amarga de este mundo,
pozos de horror y dolores extremos,
y hallaron el concepto más profundo
en el profundo «_De morir tenemos_».

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Viste el rey ropas brillantes,
y luego hace desfilar
cuatrocientos elefantes
a la orilla de la mar.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Vuela la mágica ilusión
en un ocaso de pasión,
y la acompaña una canción
del corazón.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y así, María, sé blanca,
sé rosada y sé gentil,
sé melodiosa y sé franca
y de mañana y de Abril.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y bajo sus pies huye el suelo,
y sobre sus frentes el duelo
cae de lo triste del cielo.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y sentimos la vida pura,
clara, real,
cuando la envuelve la dulzura
primaveral.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y sobre ellas ceniza avienta
el corazón de la tormenta,
y un rincón divino revienta.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
Y, no obstante, la vida es bella,
por poseer
la perla, la rosa, la estrella
y la mujer.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Jardines que hoy son cementerios
destruídos por los cauterios
de los temerosos Misterios!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Mas oid un celeste allegro!
Es que pasa en el horror negro
Santa Elena de Montenegro.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Mas oíd un celeste allegro!
Es que pasa en el horror negro
Santa Elena de Montenegro.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Oh asombro y miedo de las Musas!
¡Oh cabelleras de Medusas!
¡Oh los rictus de las empusas!

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¡Oh! Niño que con Eros juegas,
niños lozanos,
danzad como las ninfas griegas
y los silvanos.

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¿Para qué las envidias viles
y las injurias,
cuando retuercen sus reptiles
pálidas furias?

entries.author: Rubén Darío
entries.work: Poema del Otoño y otros poemas
entries.title: Rubén Darío · Poema del Otoño
entries.content:
¿Para qué los odios funestos
de los ingratos?
¿Para qué los lívidos gestos
de los Pilatos?
